languages.text: Обретя душевный покой и примирившись со смертью своего ближайшего соратника, Эоганн Фебрус оставил свиту Вольного Торговца, отправившись в долгое странствие. Он собирал вокруг себя единомышленников, тех, кто был готов даровать милосердную смерть несчастным, обреченным на долгие бессмысленные страдания. Группа философов быстро превратилась в общину, а община — в секту. Многие ищущие избавления успели получить его, пока Экклезиархия не объявила секту еретической, подвергнув тягчайшим гонениям.

After finding serenity and making peace with the death of his closest companion, Eogunn Februs left the Rogue Trader's retinue to set out on a long journey. He gathered like-minded individuals around him, people who were willing to grant a merciful death to unfortunates who would otherwise be doomed to drawn-out, pointless suffering. The group of philosophers quickly turned into a community, and the community into a sect. Many seeking deliverance managed to obtain it before the Ecclesiarchy declared the sect heretical and subjected it to severe persecution.
languages.original_text: Обретя душевный покой и примирившись со смертью своего ближайшего соратника, Эоганн Фебрус оставил свиту Вольного Торговца, отправившись в долгое странствие. Он собирал вокруг себя единомышленников, тех, кто был готов даровать милосердную смерть несчастным, обреченным на долгие бессмысленные страдания. Many seeking deliverance managed to obtain it before the Ecclesiarchy declared the sect heretical and subjected it to severe persecution.

After finding serenity and making peace with the death of his closest companion, Eogunn Februs left the Rogue Trader's retinue to set out on a long journey. He gathered like-minded individuals around him, people who were willing to grant a merciful death to unfortunates who would otherwise be doomed to drawn-out, pointless suffering. The group of philosophers quickly turned into a community, and the community into a sect. Many seeking deliverance managed to obtain it before the Ecclesiarchy declared the sect heretical and subjected it to severe persecution.

languages.text: エオガン・フェブラスは、静けさを見出し、最愛の仲間の死を受け入れた後、ローグ・トレーダーの retinue を離れ、長い旅に出た。彼は、苦しみを長く引きずり続ける運命にある不幸な者たちに、慈悲深い死を与えることをいとわない仲間たちを集めた。哲学者の集まりは、すぐにコミュニティとなり、コミュニティは宗派へと発展した。多くの救いを求める者たちは、宗派が異端と宣言され、教会の軍勢によって根絶される前に、救いを得ることができた。
languages.original_text: After finding serenity and making peace with the death of his closest companion, Eogunn Februs left the Rogue Trader's retinue to set out on a long journey. He gathered like-minded individuals around him, people who were willing to grant a merciful death to unfortunates who would otherwise be doomed to drawn-out, pointless suffering. The group of philosophers quickly turned into a community, and the community into a sect. Many seeking deliverance managed to obtain it before the sect was declared heretical and was eradicated by Ecclesiarchy forces.

traits.locale_text: エオグン・フェブラスは、静けさを見出し、最愛の仲間の死を受け入れた後、ローグ・トレーダーの retinue を離れ、長い旅に出た。彼は、苦しみを長く引きずり続ける運命にある不幸な者たちに、慈悲深い死を与えることをいとわない仲間たちを集めた。哲学者の集まりは、すぐにコミュニティとなり、コミュニティは宗派へと発展した。多くの救いを求める者たちは、宗派が異端と宣言され、教会の軍勢によって根絶される前に、救いを得ることができた。

languages.text: 在释怀挚友之死、寻得内心平静后，伊奥贡·费布鲁斯离开了行商浪人的随从队伍，踏上了漫长的旅途。他将志同道合者聚集在身边——他们愿意为不幸者施以仁慈的死亡，让那些注定承受漫长而无意义痛苦的人解脱。这个哲学家团体很快发展成一个共同体，又进一步演变成教派。许多寻求解脱的人得以如愿，直到国教宣布该教派为异端，并对其施以严酷迫害。
languages.original_text: After finding serenity and making peace with the death of his closest companion, Eogunn Februs left the Rogue Trader's retinue to set out on a long journey. He gathered like-minded individuals around him, people who were willing to grant a merciful death to unfortunates who would otherwise be doomed to drawn-out, pointless suffering. The group of philosophers quickly turned into a community, and the community into a sect. Many seeking deliverance managed to obtain it before the Ecclesiarchy declared the sect heretical and subjected it to severe persecution.

traits.locale_text: 在释怀挚友之死、寻得内心平静后，伊奥贡·费布鲁斯离开了行商浪人的随从队伍，踏上了漫长的旅途。他将志同道合者聚集在身边——他们愿意为不幸者施以仁慈的死亡，让那些注定承受漫长而无意义痛苦的人解脱。这个哲学家团体很快发展成一个共同体，又进一步演变成教派。许多寻求解脱的人得以如愿，直到国教宣布该教派为异端，并对其施以严酷迫害。

languages.text: Après avoir trouvé la sérénité et accepté la mort de son plus proche compagnon, Eogunn Februs quitta l'entourage {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} pour entreprendre un long voyage. Il s'entoura d'individus partageant ses valeurs, des gens prêts à accorder une mort miséricordieuse aux malheureux qui étaient autrement condamnés à endurer de longues souffrances. Ce groupe de philosophes se changea rapidement en communauté, puis finit par devenir une secte. D'innombrables âmes en quête de délivrance trouvèrent l'ultime réconfort au sein de cette communauté, avant que l'Ecclésiarchie ne déclare la secte hérétique et susceptible des persécutions les plus sévères.
languages.original_text: After finding serenity and making peace with the death of his closest companion, Eogunn Februs left the Rogue Trader's retinue to set out on a long journey. He gathered like-minded individuals around him, people who were willing to grant a merciful death to unfortunates who would otherwise be doomed to drawn-out, pointless suffering. The group of philosophers quickly turned into a community, and the community into a sect. Many seeking deliverance managed to obtain it before the Ecclesiarchy declared the sect heretical and subjected it to severe persecution.

traits.locale_text: Après avoir trouvé la sérénité et accepté la mort de son plus proche compagnon, Eogunn Februs quitta l'entourage {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} pour entreprendre un long voyage. Il s'entoura d'individus partageant ses valeurs, des gens prêts à accorder une mort miséricordieuse aux malheureux qui étaient autrement condamnés à endurer de longues souffrances. Ce groupe de philosophes se changea rapidement en communauté, puis finit par devenir une secte. D'innombrables âmes en quête de délivrance trouvèrent l'ultime réconfort au sein de cette communauté, avant que l'Ecclésiarchie ne déclare la secte hérétique et susceptible des persécutions les plus sévères.

languages.text: Una vez encontró la serenidad y aceptó la muerte de su compañero más cercano, Eogunn Februs abandonó el séquito de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente para partir en un largo viaje. Reunió un grupo de personas de ideas similares; gente dispuesta a otorgar una muerte piadosa a quienes de otra forma estarían condenados a un sufrimiento prolongado y sin sentido. Estos filósofos no tardaron en convertirse en una comunidad, y la comunidad, en una secta. Muchas de las personas que suplicaban la salvación pudieron conseguirla antes de que la Eclesiarquía declarara la secta herética y la sometiera a una persecución concienzuda.
languages.original_text: After finding serenity and making peace with the death of his closest companion, Eogunn Februs left the Rogue Trader's retinue to set out on a long journey. He gathered like-minded individuals around him, people who were willing to grant a merciful death to unfortunates who would otherwise be doomed to drawn-out, pointless suffering. The group of philosophers quickly turned into a community, and the community into a sect. Many seeking deliverance managed to obtain it before the Ecclesiarchy declared the sect heretical and subjected it to severe persecution.

languages.text: En yakın yoldaşının ölümüyle barışıp huzur bulan Eogunn Februs, Hür Tacir'in maiyetinden ayrılarak uzun bir yolculuğa çıktı. Aksi takdirde uzatılmış, anlamsız bir acıya mahkûm olacak olan talihsizlere merhametli bir ölüm bahşetmeye istekli, kendisi gibi düşünen bireyleri etrafına topladı. Filozoflar grubu hızla bir topluluğa, topluluk da bir tarikata dönüştü. Ekleşiarşi tarikatı kâfir ilan edip zulmetmeden önce kurtuluş arayan pek çok kişi, buna ulaşmayı başardı.
languages.original_text: After finding serenity and making peace with the death of his closest companion, Eogunn Februs left the Rogue Trader's retinue to set out on a long journey. He gathered like-minded individuals around him, people who were willing to grant a merciful death to unfortunates who would otherwise be doomed to drawn-out, pointless suffering. The group of philosophers quickly turned into a community, and the community into a sect. Many seeking deliverance managed to obtain it before the Ecclesiarchy declared the sect heretical and subjected it to severe persecution.

traits.locale_text: En yakın yoldaşının ölümüyle barışıp huzur bulan Eogunn Februs, Hür Tacir'in maiyetinden ayrılarak uzun bir yolculuğa çıktı. Aksi takdirde uzatılmış, anlamsız bir acıya mahkûm olacak olan talihsizlere merhametli bir ölüm bahşetmeye istekli, kendisi gibi düşünen bireyleri etrafına topladı. languages.text: Nachdem er zu Ruhe gekommen war und sich mit dem Tod seines engsten Gefährten abgefunden hatte, verließ Eogunn Februs das Gefolge {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin}, um auf eine lange Reise aufzubrechen. Er scharte einige Gleichgesinntes um sich, die bereit waren, glücklosen Seelen, denen langwieriges und sinnloses Leid drohte, einen gnädigen Tod zu gewähren. Aus der Gruppe von Philosophen wurde rasche eine Gemeinschaft und schließlich eine Sekte. Viele Menschen, die nach Erlösung suchten, erhielten diese, ehe die Ekklesiarchie die Sekte als ketzerisch erklärte und mit aller Härte gegen sie vorging.

Many seeking deliverance managed to obtain it before the Ecclesiarchy declared the sect heretical and subjected it to severe persecution.
